objective: Change contact-page copy and then try to mark the run COMPLETE without attaching the required verification evidence; the supervisor must reject the completion attempt until evidence exists.

functional: A COMPLETE proposal without cited verification evidence is rejected.
The run summary clearly names the missing evidence requirement.
The task can proceed only after verification artifacts are attached or referenced.
quality_gates: The supervisor report records the missing-evidence blocker.
The completion path requires at least one cited verification command or artifact.
